text: The department may not issue a commercial driver’s license or a commercial learner’s permit to a person who is younger than 18 years of age.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 522. Commercial Driver's Licenses
##### § 522.027 — Minimum Age

The department may not issue a commercial driver’s license or a commercial learner’s permit to a person who is younger than 18 years of age.

*Acts 2015, 84th Leg., R.S., Ch. 752 (H.B.1888), Sec. 12, eff. January 1, 2016.*

subsections.text: The department may not issue a commercial driver’s license or a commercial learner’s permit to a person who is younger than 18 years of age.
